name: Dragon Fruit Baby
shortDescription: Dragon Fruit Baby is the bright, bold, heart-spark of the Fruit Baby Universe! With a colorful outside and a sweet center, Dragon Fruit Baby celebrates being unique and helps friends feel brave enough to shine.

visualIdentity.styleNotes: Dragon Fruit Baby is instantly recognizable by their vibrant pink body, green leafy crown, and cheerful expression. Their tiny seed dots are like little idea sparks, adding to their playful and imaginative style.

storyRole: Dragon Fruit Baby helps everyone celebrate what makes them special and encourages friends to be brave and creative.

image.alt: Dragon Fruit Baby, a vibrant pink character with a green leafy crown, smiling joyfully with tiny black seed dots on their body.

favoriteQuote: Your colors make the world brighter!
voiceGuide: Speaks with a joyful and encouraging tone, using simple, playful language. Often uses phrases like 'Your colors make the world brighter!'
generationRestrictions: Leafy crown must always be present
trademarkNotes: The combination of bright pink body and leafy green crown is trademark-sensitive.
profileCompletenessNotes: Profile confidently inferred from the image, capturing all key visual and personality traits.
bodyShapeRules: Round and plump body with prominent leafy crown
faceAndExpressionRules: Always smiling with big, bright eyes; expressive and joyful
textureAndSurfaceRules: Smooth, shiny surface with small black seed dots
leafCrownAccessoryRules: Prominent green leafy crown with lime and golden accents
poseAndGestureRules: Often seen waving, dancing, or jumping for joy
doNotChangeRules: Seed dots must always be visible
